channel.title: Ma441s on MathTR
channel.description: Recent content in Ma441s on MathTR

item.description: <!DOCTYPE html> MA441 Learning Goals MA441 Learning Goals There are in total learning goals. Check the goals you have mastered and click the following button to see your level of mastery. Check My Level of Mastery Congratulation! You have mastered about of learning goals. Algebra and Geometry of Functions F1: I can use function notations to describe functions. F2: I can evaluate and graph functions. F3: I can find domain, range and intercepts of a function.
